title: I Waited So Long for THIS All-In-One Price Action Indicator!
thesis_bullets: I want to show something amazing, a new indicator that gives you a dashboard related to market structure and price action concepts.

[music] It is an all-in-one indicator combining order block, fair value gap, liquidity sweep, volume analysis, volatility analysis, swing high and swing low, market structure labels, and many more concepts.
And the excellent feature is that all these concepts can be displayed independently in up to seven [music] different time frames.
And everything is shown here in this dashboard.
This is the best indicator I've ever seen on Trading View.
I will completely explain this indicator and how you can use it.
All right, on Trading View platform here, we click on indicators and we search market structure dashboard this one which is written by flux chart.
All right, as you can see a dashboard is added to our chart here.
There are lots of information here but don't worry I will completely explain everything.
This dashboard provides some information related to market structure and price action concepts and it has the ability to show them independently for different time frames.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on daily.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on daily: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

candidate_signals.name: alignment_entry
candidate_signals.description: Enter only when primary trend signal and confirmation filter agree on bar close.
uses_indicators: market structure dashboard this one which is written by flux chart

combo_proposals.description: Confirm long only when Institutional Structure Intelligence Engine [JOAT] bullish pressure is above control level (>=30) on daily bar close.
combo_proposals.doctrine_hint: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.

combo_proposals.description: Use longer MACD side of zero as trend direction gate before entries.
combo_proposals.doctrine_hint: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.

combo_proposals.description: Trigger entries when shorter MACD aligns with longer MACD direction.
combo_proposals.doctrine_hint: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.

combo_proposals.description: Gate entries when Institutional Structure Intelligence Engine [JOAT] stays above control threshold to avoid weak-pressure chop.
combo_proposals.doctrine_hint: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.

combo_proposals.description: Derived idea: use ATR-based stop/TP envelope for deterministic testability of swing-style stops.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
